role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (steep mountains, mist, forest types).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Pinus, broadleaf) and forest composition.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (concrete gutters, asphalt width) and absence of signs.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Analyzed the Google Street View camera rig (hood visibility) and image quality.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline failed because the correct country (Bhutan) was never nominated by any specialist. The agents relied heavily on East Asian analogs (Taiwan, Vietnam, Japan) and a Central Asian meta-cue, missing the specific regulatory and landscape markers of Bhutan. The tournament then correctly selected the best available candidate (Taiwan) from the pool.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described the steep, misty, forested terrain.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Accurately described the mix of pine and broadleaf trees.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the concrete drainage gutter and narrow road.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Accurately described the visible car hood.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The ground truth (Bhutan) was not included in the candidate pool. The landscape, botanics, and regulatory agents all drifted towards East Asian analogs (Taiwan, Vietnam, Japan) based on generic subtropical mountain features, while the meta agent focused on a camera rig artifact. None of the specialists identified the specific regulatory or landscape markers of Bhutan.
